On Mayor Mamdani’s First-Ever Visit to the UN, He Calls it ‘Beautiful’
item.description: Thousands of Americans, including young students, are one part of the million visitors that the United Nations receives annually, and Zohran Mamdani, the mayor of the host city of the 80-year-old organization, joined the pack with the boss of the institution as his personal tour guide. Mamdani visited UN headquarters on March 31 for a ... Read more

item.title: Once Evicted From This Kashmir Lake, People Now Seen as Its Saviours
item.description: For the past few weeks, residents living in and around Dal Lake in Indian Kashmir have witnessed “a different phenomenon” as a green sludge has accumulated on the once pristine water. Photos circulating widely on social media triggered a public outcry. Some citizens and environmentalists warned that the transformation reflects heavy sewage pollution in this […]
